item.title: Post-CQ-005: silent catch blocks in new src/secure/firewall/firewall.ts
item.intent: The new firewall module created by CQ-005 must not have silent catch blocks. Firewall rule failures that are silently swallowed allow a misconfigured firewall to go undetected.
item.description: BUG-014 intentionally deferred the 5 silent catch blocks in src/build/launcher/firewall.ts because CQ-005 moves that code to src/secure/firewall/firewall.ts. When CQ-005 is complete, the moved firewall code must be checked for silent catches and fixed. The original 5 locations were lines 98,106,127,137,165 in the old firewall.ts — these handle iptables rule application, removal, and verification errors. Steps: (1) CQ-005 must be complete first; (2) open src/secure/firewall/firewall.ts (the new CQ-005 file); (3) search for 'catch {' and 'catch (_' patterns; (4) add console.warn() with error and context for each non-fatal catch; (5) do NOT convert non-fatal catches to throws — keep fallback behaviour; (6) run firewall tests (using EXEC_DRY=1) after. Scope: ~5 one-line additions in one file. Blocked by CQ-005.
